scripts.build: bun run clean && bun install && bun run build:sdk && bun -F @clinebot/cli build
scripts.dev: bun --conditions=development run build:sdk && bun run cli && bun run cli rpc stop
scripts.test:unit: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; bun -F @clinebot/agents test & p1=$!; bun -F @clinebot/llms test & p2=$!; bun -F @clinebot/scheduler test & p3=$!; bun -F @clinebot/core test:unit & p4=$!; bun -F @clinebot/cli test:unit & p5=$!; wait $p1; wait $p2; wait $p3; wait $p4; wait $p5'
scripts.check: bun biome check --diagnostic-level=error && bun run build:sdk && bun run -F @clinebot/cli build && bun --parallel -F './packages/**' -F @clinebot/cli typecheck && bun scripts/check-publish.ts

*: bun run types && bun biome check --staged --no-errors-on-unmatched --files-ignore-unknown=true
